strengths: Extensive TypeScript and Node.js expertise with proven ability to build scalable systems handling millions of requests
Full-stack architectural understanding demonstrated across web, mobile, and desktop with React experience at Optilyz
AWS and infrastructure knowledge (CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) significantly exceeds role requirements
concerns: Severe overqualification: Staff-level engineer with 15+ years experience pursuing entry-level position creates significant flight risk
Eight-month unexplained career gap (Oct 2025-Jun 2026) with no context or rationale provided
No explicit PostgreSQL experience mentioned; background shows MongoDB and MySQL/SQL but not the preferred relational database

key_factors.factor: TypeScript, Node.js, React, and full-stack architecture expertise
Unexplained career gap and PostgreSQL skill gap

response.justification: This candidate brings significantly advanced technical capabilities across all required domains—TypeScript, Node.js, React, REST APIs, and cloud infrastructure—far exceeding the entry-level role's expectations. However, the fundamental concern is severe overqualification: a Staff-level engineer with 15 years of experience and multiple senior positions is highly unlikely to remain in an entry-level fullstack role, presenting substantial retention risk. Combined with an unexplained eight-month career gap and absence of the preferred PostgreSQL experience (though SQL knowledge is present), this profile suggests either significant misalignment of expectations or undisclosed circumstances affecting candidate stability.
